name: U.S. Passport
description: Unexpired U.S. Passport establishing both identity and employment authorization.

name: U.S. Passport Card
description: Wallet-size card establishing identity and employment authorization.

name: Permanent Resident Card (Form I-551)
description: Green Card establishing identity and employment authorization.

name: Foreign Passport with I-551 Stamp
description: Foreign passport containing a temporary I-551 stamp or MRIV.

name: Employment Authorization Document (Form I-766)
description: EAD card establishing identity and employment authorization.

name: Foreign Passport with Form I-94
description: Foreign passport with Form I-94/I-94A for certain nonimmigrant categories.

name: Driver's License (U.S. State)
description: Driver's license issued by a U.S. state or outlying possession, with photo or identifying information.

name: Government-Issued ID Card
description: ID card issued by federal, state, or local government agency.

name: School ID with Photograph
description: School identification card with a photograph.

name: Voter Registration Card
description: Voter's registration card.

name: U.S. Military Card or Draft Record
document_title: U.S. Military Card or Draft Record
description: U.S. military card or draft record.
typical_issuing_authority: U.S. Department of Defense / Selective Service

name: Military Dependent's ID Card
description: Military dependent's identification card.

name: U.S. Coast Guard Merchant Mariner Card
document_title: U.S. Coast Guard Merchant Mariner Card
description: U.S. Coast Guard Merchant Mariner Document (MMD) card.

name: Native American Tribal Document (List B)
description: Native American tribal document used to establish identity.

name: Canadian Driver's License
description: Driver's license issued by a Canadian government authority.

name: U.S. Social Security Card (Unrestricted)
description: Unrestricted Social Security account number card (no work-authorization restriction printed).

name: Certification of Report of Birth
description: Certification of Report of Birth issued by the Department of State (Form DS-1350, FS-545, or FS-240).

name: U.S. Birth Certificate
description: Original or certified copy of a birth certificate issued by a U.S. state, county, municipal authority, or territory bearing an official seal.

name: Native American Tribal Document (List C)
description: Native American tribal document used to establish employment authorization.

name: U.S. Citizen ID Card (Form I-197)
description: U.S. Citizen Identification Card (Form I-197).

name: Resident Citizen ID Card (Form I-179)
description: Identification Card for Use of Resident Citizen in the United States (Form I-179).

name: DHS Employment Authorization Document
description: Employment authorization document issued by the Department of Homeland Security (List C, other than Form I-766).
